violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw chicken, raw shelled eggs and raw hamburgers were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as hamburger buns and bacon in the grill cooler and walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Service was called during time of inspection. Bar glassware will be washed rinsed and sanitized in 3 bay sink or kitchen dishmachine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
Cabbage Slaw was observed held past 7 days. Food was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

The food prep sink in the kitchen, ice wells in the main bar, and the ice well and sink for the event bar are lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to adjust air gaps so that they meet approved requirements. Call to service was placed during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
